subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I'm now considered the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and I'm not exaggerating when I say meeting our goal this week is critical to our success in this race.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633879/1a8421e1/1a4cbd9cf/488f3450/1252650933/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")

This deadline is important for several reasons, friends. One, the campaign is getting busy. Our volunteers and field staffers are hitting the phones and talking to their neighbors about the election, and we need to meet this goal to make sure we can keep printing walk packets and yard signs.

_**Two, the far-right is really coming after me in earnest.**_ A super PAC just dropped **$50,000** to prop up one of my opponents, and another is already up on TV bragging that she would be a rubber stamp for the far-right's agenda.

I'm proud to serve Arizona families in Congress, and I'll keep fighting for you, every day. [**But I 'm counting on you to make sure I meet this goal so my re-election campaign can keep going strong. Please consider chipping in today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. Tom

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A quick note (sorry for the late hour)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I hope I didn't wake you up.

I know it's late, but I've been taking stock of everything this team has accomplished so far in the race and I wanted to send you a note about how proud I am. We've opened more than [20 field offices](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1229/3e0906/6ecf0a8a/3e35237f/1457397601/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+20+field+offices&utm_campaign=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&source=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late") all across the Commonwealth. Nearly [50 organizers](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1229/3e0906/6ecf0a8a/3e35237e/1457397601/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+50+organizers&utm_campaign=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&source=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late") are on the ground empowering folks in their communities to get involved. [Thousands of volunteers](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1229/3e0906/6ecf0a8a/3e35237d/1457397601/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Thousands+of+volunteers&utm_campaign=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&source=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late") are spending their evenings and weekends knocking on doors and making phone calls. And I'm proud to be working and campaigning alongside [all eleven Congressional candidates](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1229/3e0906/6ecf0a8a/3e35237c/1457397601/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+all+eleven+Congressional+candidates&utm_campaign=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&source=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late") to make sure that these resources are their resources, too. **My team has some really cool stuff planned for the next three months that I can't wait for you to see.**

Here in Virginia, we're building up a foundation to try a couple of new ways to reach voters that I'm really excited about. We have the chance to write a blueprint for how Democrats running at every level and in every part of the country can win - not just in 2018, but in the 2019 and 2020 elections, too. **But to do all that, we need your help.**

[Missing our July goal puts these plans in jeopardy. If, like me, you're ready to see what this team can do, help power our program here >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1229/3e0906/6ecf0a8a/3e352373/1457397601/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Missing+our+July+goal+puts+these+plans+i&utm_campaign=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&source=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1229/3e0906/6ecf0a8a/3e352372/1457397601/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&source=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1229/3e0906/6ecf0a8a/3e352371/1457397601/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&source=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late")

| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1229/3e0906/6ecf0a8a/3e352370/1457397601/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late_100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late&source=20180728_2_FR_TK_EOM-late")

I appreciate everything you've done for me so far - and I hope you'll stick with me through the finish line.

Have a good night (and go to bed soon - it's late!),

_\- Tim_

name: McDaniel for Senate
subject: On the Trail with Chris: Democrats Buying Election, Interview w/ Lars Larson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
Democrats are buying their way into this election. Liberal billionaires like Sean Parker and George Soros are bankrolling my opponents, because they want us to lose. It doesn’t matter that we don’t want them, or that Mississippi has rejected their radical agenda time and time again. All they care about is silencing conservatives like us. Peter, Democrats are buying their way into this election. Liberal billionaires like Sean Parker and George Soros are bankrolling my opponents, because they want us to lose. It doesn’t matter that we don’t want them, or that Mississippi has rejected their radical agenda time and time again. All they care about is silencing conservatives like us. It’s so important for us to be able to fight back against these out-of-state Democrats. Please chip in and support our campaign before it’s too late. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180727_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180727_NL] - Chris On The Trail BILOXI Team McDaniel was loud and proud today at the Blue Angels air show in Biloxi! We love the Mississippi Gulf Coast! ------------ FLORENCE Chris had a beautiful meet & greet with supporters in Florence. Thank you so much to Mr. Doug and Mrs. Jan Lemon for hosting us! ------------ NATCHEZ Chris had a great time hanging out with some old friends at the Bicentennial Celebration for the Grand Lodge of Mississippi F.&A.M. (Masons). ON THE AIR Chris was interviewed by nationally syndicated radio host Lars Larson this week. If you weren’t able to tune in, you can listen to the whole interview by clicking here. [https://www.facebook.com/ChrisMcDanielForUSSenate/videos/849779725231935/] IN THE NEWS Paul Reese in Grenada County and Wayne Lagrone in Lauderdale County were published in their local papers this week because they want to set the record straight about the conservative movement. They wanted to let their communities know that conservatives are alive and well in Mississippi. Thank you for all you do! You can read Wayne’s letter to the editor by clicking here, [https://www.dailyleader.com/2018/07/25/salter-missed-mark-on-mcdaniel-hyde-smith/] and read Paul’s letter below. ICYMI McDaniel Only Conservative for Senator in the Mississippi Special Election Campaign finance reports revealed last week that Cindy Hyde-Smith and Mike Espy are both funded by the Democratic machine. Napster and Facebook co-founder Sean Parker contributed $250,000 to a Super PAC set up specifically to support Cindy Hyde-Smith. Meanwhile, well-known Democratic donor George Soros has maxed out his contribution to Mike Espy’s campaign. Read the full article by clicking here. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/mcdaniel-only-conservative-for-senator-in-the-mississippi-special-election/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180727_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180727_NL] ------------ McDaniel Calls on Cindy Hyde-Smith to Demand Super PAC Return Hillary Clinton Donor Money U.S. Senate candidate Chris McDaniel is calling on Cindy Hyde-Smith to demand that her Super PAC return the $250,000 dollars accepted from one of Hillary Clinton’s largest donors, Napster and Facebook co-founder Sean Parker. Read the full article by clicking here. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/mcdaniel-calls-on-cindy-hyde-smith-to-demand-super-pac-return-hillary-clinton-donor-money/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180727_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180727_NL] Don’t Let Democrats Buy Our Election West-coast billionaire liberals Sean Parker and George Soros are bankrolling our opponents in this race. Parker and Soros don’t care about Mississippi or our values; all they care about is making sure true conservatives like us don’t win. Fight back against this dirty money by chipping in to our support our campaign, and show these radical leftists that we won’t be silenced! subject: Bay day!

body:
Hi friend,
The sun is supposed to come out today! I hope you make the most of it by visiting our beaches. **Today is Bay Day, so there 's free parking and public transit, too.** I can't wait -- I'll be heading out to Sand Hill Cove! Rhode Island is the Ocean State and we've got to protect our coastline so that every family can enjoy the bay and beaches for generations to come.
Just two weeks ago, I signed an Executive Order to decrease our reliance on single-use plastics, all to help reduce pollution. **We are home to the first offshore wind farm in the U.S., and soon we 'll be adding a second one!** And we're standing up against the Trump Administration's threat to open our coast to oil exploration and offshore drilling.
All of this progress is at stake. **In order to keep our bay and beaches wonderful for future generations, I need your help.[Can you donate $27 now to help preserve our beautiful bay and beaches? ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0f0/5e076a9e/54052a78/144267e6/1933938052/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gmr-wind?refcode=180728")**

name: Peter Joffrion
subject: Brooks thinks he’s got this race in the bag
body:
Hi there,

For eight years, my opponent has held office in Alabama's 5th District, and he doesn’t think we stand a chance at this seat because he has “more than enough” cash on hand to win.

We outraised him by $60k during the second quarter. We’ve connected with thousands of voters across the district. Our campaign reflects the values of the people here in North Alabama and from the start, this has been about you.

I know it’ll take a lot of hard work to flip this seat, but our team is ready to put up a fight because we all deserve better.
The only way to accomplish real change is by working at the hands-on level. In Congress, I’ll listen to you and your concerns and be a strong voice in Washington because everyone deserves a seat at the table.

Let’s show Brooks that we’re ready for a change in leadership here in AL-05 and that we’re not going to give him an easy race. We’re coming up on our end of month deadline and we’re pushing hard to raise $15k by Tuesday at midnight.

If unseating an incumbent who cares more about advancing his career than responding to the needs of his constituents is important to you, invest in our campaign before our end of month deadline.

You can donate directly here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterjoffrion4alabama?refcode=20180729

Thank you kindly,

Peter

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States

body:
#
Hey Team, did you catch Bob’s email from yesterday with our State of the Race report? **Today we are 100 days away from Election Day, November 6.**
I hope it gives you a good idea of where we’re at in this campaign. While the political pundits originally thought we were a longshot, you’ve helped us prove them wrong every step of the way.
Now, our opponent is counting on millions of dollars from dark money groups to flood into Tennessee so they can tear down Governor Bredesen -- and we can’t afford to just sit back and let that happen.
[**Can you chip in $15 ahead of our end-of-month deadline so we have the resources we’ll need to keep this campaign focused?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1763784/9334507/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWU0YjEzZi00OTkzLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtXtLnWsLRvKEAcViL5w0MI508kzwHyJQWOpS2auYKk=&refcode=em180729-pre-primary-deadline-3-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1763785/9334508/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWU0YjEzZi00OTkzLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtXtLnWsLRvKEAcViL5w0MI508kzwHyJQWOpS2auYKk=&refcode=em180729-pre-primary-deadline-3-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)**
We need your help to keep up the momentum.
Laura Zapata, Communications Director

* * *

Team --
In the last few weeks, we’ve put together a report on the State Of The Race for Governor Bredesen’s campaign for U.S. Senate — and I wanted to share some topline analysis with you.
[**I also wanted to take another opportunity to ask for your support by chipping in $15 or whatever you can for our upcoming deadline. I hope this report helps to explain why it’s so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1763786/9334536/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWU0YjEzZi00OTkzLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtXtLnWsLRvKEAcViL5w0MI508kzwHyJQWOpS2auYKk=&refcode=em180729-pre-primary-deadline-3-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)
**1\. We’ve focused on Tennessee, not Washington, and that’s won over supporters of all backgrounds and from every corner of the state.**
With a disciplined message on what our next U.S. Senator out to do -- put Tennessee first --- our campaign has tuned out the partisan noise and kept this race about the issues like making our economy work for everyone, making health care more affordable, and ending tariffs that are hurting Tennessee families and businesses.
**2\. Our opposition has been caught sleep walking, and they’re hitting the panic button.**
Our opponent thought that a campaign like ours, focused on bringing people together to bring common sense to Washington, could never succeed in an era of toxic, hyper-partisan politics. Now they know just how wrong they were — and they’re begging for help from the Washington establishment and its network of special interest and out-of-state mega-donors to pour millions into this race. They’re also doing everything they can to drag this race into the mud, promising they’ll inflict “death by 10,000 cuts” to our campaign.
**3\. We’re turning our momentum and grassroots support into action so we can win this November.**
With thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipping in to our campaign, we’ve been able to make a massive investment in growing a campaign the right way. That means opening dozens of grassroots offices across the state, training hundreds of volunteers to knock doors and make calls, and getting our message in front of voters on TV and online.
Your support has been key to getting us where we are in this race. But we can’t afford to be complacent — we will be 100 days from Election Day tomorrow and we need to keep this up if we’re going to elect Phil Bredesen on Election Day. **So I’m asking:**
[**Can you chip in $15 or whatever you can today so we can keep this up? Your donations are directly sustaining our momentum and keeping up with the millions being spent against us by the special interests.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1763787/9334537/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWU0YjEzZi00OTkzLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtXtLnWsLRvKEAcViL5w0MI508kzwHyJQWOpS2auYKk=&refcode=em180729-pre-primary-deadline-3-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1763788/9334538/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWU0YjEzZi00OTkzLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtXtLnWsLRvKEAcViL5w0MI508kzwHyJQWOpS2auYKk=&refcode=em180729-pre-primary-deadline-3-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)**
I’m proud of how far we’ve come in the last few months of this campaign, and I hope you are too.
Thanks for being on our team,
Bob Corney
Campaign Manager
Bredesen for Senate
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1763789/9334539/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWU0YjEzZi00OTkzLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtXtLnWsLRvKEAcViL5w0MI508kzwHyJQWOpS2auYKk=&refcode=em180729-pre-primary-deadline-3-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)**

Peter,
It's been over 450 days since I first began my listening tour of the district. **And today we are 100 days from Election Day!**
We have 100 days to help the people of this district whose voices and needs are often overlooked. People like Jill in Murphys, who has a pre-existing condition and was deciding with her husband whether they could risk buying a home given the cost of her healthcare. Or Lauren in Sonora, working a full-time job and still living in a women's shelter with her children because she can't afford housing in her community. Or Monte in Auburn, who's taking care of his sick wife and providing for his adult kids while they look for jobs.
**We have 100 days left to help the people of our district --people like Jill, Lauren, and Monte, working hard to pay their bills and support their loved ones. **Because of your generous donations and support, we 've done what political pros said was impossible--we out-raised the incumbent four quarters in a row.** And our support is growing--just a few days ago, EMILY's List endorsed us. We can't back down now.

subject: 100 days for change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

100 days.

That's all that stands between us and the November 6 election. I'm more energized than ever to work hard and make meaningful change -- and that's what Amy is dedicated to doing each day that she's in the Senate.

She's asking important questions like, "What can we do to make our elections more secure _right now_? What can we do to protect our environment and combat climate change _right now_? What can we do to make prescription drugs more affordable _right now_?"

**Keeping Amy in the Senate where she 's working to address these issues is the first step, and we have an important $50,000 end-of-month deadline coming up. Can you make a contribution to her campaign so that she can keep working for Minnesotans in the Senate?**

body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e600a/51dbcc2a/19e9e6b0/3a6b9f4/3170059622/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") In 100 days, Pennsylvanians will head to the polls and decide whether or not to re-elect me to represent them in the Senate.

I've spent my life fighting for working families with both fists up, making sure that people across the Commonwealth have access to quality, affordable health care and an education that will lead to a good job. Time and time again, when the Republican elite push policies that make it harder for middle-class families to get ahead, I have said no, because I stand with you.

While I've been fighting for working families, the President and the Vice President have been working together to attack me and elect my opponent to the Senate.

Fighting off Republican attacks is nothing new for me. Ever since I voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, they've had their eyes on this race. The Koch brothers have sent people to knock doors right here in PA, and next week, President Trump himself will campaign with my opponent. They want someone who will be a yes vote for the most dangerous parts of their agenda without question, not someone who will put families and workers first.

I'm proud of my record, and I'm ready to keep fighting, now and for the next 100 days, but I need your help. **If we want to celebrate on November 6, I need a strong network of grassroots donors, giving what they can to keep this campaign moving forward. Chip in $5 right now to be a part of it.**

name: Team Scholten
subject: 100 Days to Dethrone Steve King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
J.D. and everyone here at Team Scholten has put their all into this fight. Long hours and not enough sleep have been the norm for the past year that we’ve been working on this campaign, but we’ve put in this type of diligent effort because this is too important to do anything less. And now here we are, **100 days away from Election Day.**
To this point, we’ve done all we can. **We’ve outraised Steve King. We’ve outworked Steve King. J.D. has talked about the issues Steve King won’t even acknowledge and he’s stopped in the small towns that most people just drive by.** The Cook Report called Steve King “at risk,” and Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball prediction has moved Steve King out of the “Safe” rating for the first time in years. **Put simply, J.D. Scholten has put us in a position to win.** But there is still so much to do, and 100 days can go by so quickly on a campaign such as this. If you’ve been saying to yourself, “I should donate one of these times,” that time is now. If you’ve been thinking, “I should volunteer one of these days,” that time is now. Again, we’re in a position to win, but whether or not we can bring this home and finally retire Steve King depends in large part on your effort and support over these next 100 days. [**_We’d be grateful if you’d consider helping us kick off the final 100 days with a contribution of $100. Or $50. Or $25. Or $10. _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1766322/9346568/-252898638?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjRjYWE2Yi02ZjkzLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YHfzW_b33qHHVFElB91lnEMQdi8KPnCZtzqd6eV1CTg=)
Truthfully, every donation we receive moves us a little closer to victory. As J.D. likes to say, **“Together, we can build a 4th District, an Iowa, and an America that truly Stands Tall for All!”**
Thank you for your continued support,
Team Scholten

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: Defeating Ted Cruz and sending Beto to the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Today’s the day: just 100 days until Election Day. (No pressure!)

Our team has been organizing in communities across Texas, talking to
voters about Beto’s people-powered campaign -- and laying the groundwork
we need to win.

In these final 100 days, we need to push our team to the limits. To win
against Ted Cruz and the dark-money groups in his corner, we need to go
above and beyond what’s ever been done in the state of Texas. There’s no
other option.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180729&amount=3&t=1019&akid=1778%2E444211%2ExDOHAM ]The way we win is simple: by having real, meaningful conversations
with voters. And in order to contact more voters, we need resources. Pitch
in
$3
right now to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal.

Together, we're running a truly historic campaign to change the future of
our state and our country. Thanks to the hard work our volunteers have put
into knocking on doors and making calls at record levels, we have an
opportunity to unseat Ted Cruz and elect Beto O’Rourke to the Senate. We
can’t let this opportunity pass us by.

It’s not just about how this election will affect Texas. With a Senate
majority hanging in the balance, the outcome in November will impact
millions of peoples’ lives across the country. That’s why we’re going to
fight like hell to win.

In these next 100 days, we need to significantly increase the numbers of
voters we’re contacting. We’ll need our volunteers to step up and lead
more block walks and phone banks than ever before. It’s the only way we’ll
reach all the Texas voters we need to win.

I know we can do it -- because I’ve seen this team do extraordinary

Primary season might be more than halfway over, but we can't afford to slow down now.

Seventeen states will hold primary elections in August alone. Five are critical swing states, where voter turnout could predict what will happen on Election Day in November.

Early voting has already started in some of these states, so our support _right now_ is crucial to helping our candidates win.

**[Donate $3 to help hit our $300,000 End-of-Month goal and help pro-choice Democratic women make it through their primary elections next month.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4e36/24c69fd9/270b40cbc/18857c50/2787692332/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+hit+our+300000+EndofMon&utm_campaign=WQEFES73N_digital_email_20180729_EOMAugPrimaries_inact&source=WQEFES73N_digital_email_20180729_EOMAugPrimaries_inact")**

**There are just 100 DAYS left before the election!**

[**We need your help to prevent Bob Hugin from buying this election before it 's too late. Donate to Bob Menendez >> **](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cac/3af3c5d/3bda88d2/4ec39f74/2137181080/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_julyeom?gpsid=5_73_2384&refcode=em18_180729_EOM100_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180729_EOM100_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cac/3af3c5d/3bda88d2/4ec39f74/2137181080/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_julyeom?gpsid=5_73_2384&refcode=em18_180729_EOM100_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180729_EOM100_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene")** FIRSTNAME|Friend,

Today marks 100 days until the general election. That means we only have 100 days left to stop Bob Hugin from buying New Jersey's U.S. Senate seat for Donald Trump.

As news continues to break regarding Bob Hugin's shameful record of gouging cancer patients with sky-high drug prices, supporting Donald Trump, and holding misogynistic and bigoted beliefs for decades, we have to make sure voters see the stories.

[**Chip in $1, $10, or even $100 this weekend to help make sure New Jerseyans know why it's never mattered more to re-elect Democratic Senator Bob Menendez in November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cac/3af3c5d/3bda88d2/4ec39f74/2137181080/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_julyeom?gpsid=5_73_2384&refcode=em18_180729_EOM100_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180729_EOM100_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene")

Bob Menendez has always been a champion for affordable healthcare, women's rights, and LGBTQ equality. And unlike Hugin, Menendez has stood up to Trump every step of the way. In the Senate, Menendez has fought to save and strengthen Obamacare, protect funding for Planned Parenthood, and stop extreme right-wing judges from being installed in our courts.

Menendez will always fight to protect New Jerseyans from Trump's agenda. Hugin won't.

We don't have to match Bob Hugin's $20 million warchest, but we do need the resources to compete and let voters know the facts about the choice they have in November.

[**Every dollar counts, so please help us make sure we re-elect Democratic Senator Bob Menendez. Chip in $1 or more now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cac/3af3c5d/3bda88d2/4ec39f74/2137181080/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_julyeom?gpsid=5_73_2384&refcode=em18_180729_EOM100_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180729_EOM100_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene")

Thank you,

Frank

body:

---
| | | Friends, **It's hard to believe, but we're only 100 days away from Election Day!** [Will you join our grassroots team](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=1702672406&e=bfe3be83a5) of awesome volunteers to help us make phone calls, knock on doors, and attend events all around the district? [](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=3fdaef9fdf&e=bfe3be83a5)
This weekend, Team Banks enjoyed greeting folks as they visited the Republican Booth at the Allen County 4-H Fairgrounds in Fort Wayne.

The team also joined fellow Republicans in Steuben and Adams County for the Vermont Settlement Parade in Orland and the Swiss Days Festival Parade in Berne.

We hope you will join our team on the campaign trail soon to help lead us to victory in November!

Working for you,

subject: Anything is possible
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37a8/9e00690/59fd3c2f/2402f9d9/1708176185/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180729_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&source=em18_180729_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx")
Friends,

Mayor Andrew Gillum has been traveling the state and fighting to rebuild Florida into one that works for all of us -- even in a crowded Democratic field of millionaires.

Now, while he may not come from the same background as his opponents, Mayor Gillum has proven time and time again that he is the most dedicated and qualified person running to turn this state around.

Friends, I know we send a lot of emails asking for help to spread his story to every corner of the state, but this deadline is absolutely critical for this campaign. It's the final end-of-month deadline before the primary.

**[So, will you chip in $5 before our critical end-of-month deadline? All donations through midnight on Tuesday will be TRIPLE MATCHED!](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37a8/9e00690/59fd3c2f/2402f9d8/1708176185/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2368&refcode=em18_180729_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180729_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+So+will+you+chip+in++ask++before+our+cri")**

Listen, I'll be honest. We have work to do in these final weeks leading up to the primary, but that's never stopped us -- even when some doubted this campaign from the beginning. Mayor Gillum's been fighting to make a difference in his community his entire life, and you've helped build this grassroots campaign from the ground up -- and now, he can make history on August 28.

No one imagined that a kid born into a working-class neighborhood could run such an unapologetically progressive campaign for Governor of our state. But he is -- and thanks to people like you, we're proving anything is possible.

**[So chip in $5 before our crucial end-of-month deadline on Tuesday and have your contribution triple matched.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37a8/9e00690/59fd3c2f/2402f9db/1708176185/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2368&refcode=em18_180729_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180729_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+So+chip+in++ask++before+our+crucial+endo")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Brendan McPhillips
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

subject: The most important thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
| | |

Friends--

We're not even two years into Trump's presidency**-- and it has been one disaster after another**. **Thankfully there's an election coming up, and it's an opportunity to send a clear message that we're not standing for Trump's agenda. **

The stakes in this election couldn't be higher. With the future of the Supreme Court hanging in the balance, everything we've fought for is at stake. Women's rights, voting rights, our environment, and so much more. **Unless every single one of us does our part and votes in 2018, we could be looking at years of Republican control. **
**Friends, everything is on the line in 2018 --I'm asking because it might be the most important thing you do this year:**
| | **Will you vote in 2018?**

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: With 100 days until the election, where do you stand, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4e23/24c69fd9/26f8decb6/188575e2/1395930144/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES74N_digital_email_20180729_EOMSRec100Days_inact&source=WQEFES74N_digital_email_20180729_EOMSRec100Days_inact")
---

Peter,

Today officially marks 100 days until Election Day 2018.

This is the culmination of everything we've been working for this cycle -- from recruiting and training women to run for office, to helping them get their names on ballots, to getting them through their primary elections.

That also means there are only 100 days left to make sure everyone who wants to can be part of what's sure to be a record-breaking cycle.

So I took a look at our supporter records to see who has donated for the 2018 cycle, and here's what I have down for this email address:
**2018 Cycle Donor Status:** Not yet
**Suggested Action:[Donate $3 to help reach our $300,000 End-of-Month goal and help pro-choice Democratic women win this year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4e23/24c69fd9/26f8decb6/188575e3/1395930144/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup14594++100+else&utm_campaign=WQEFES74N_digital_email_20180729_EOMSRec100Days_inact&source=WQEFES74N_digital_email_20180729_EOMSRec100Days_inact")**
It's hard to believe it's almost here.

In 100 days, voters will head to the polls to determine if Democrats can flip the House and Senate.

We'll know how many new pro-choice Democratic women governors we elected, how many state legislative chambers we flipped from red to blue, and how many new women we elected at the state and local level, too.

We have high hopes for our victories on Election Day, but we have to make every day between now and then count.

Are you with us?

**Donate $3 to help reach our $300,000 End-of-Month goal and help pro-choice Democratic women win big on Election Day:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-July-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4e23/24c69fd9/26f8decb6/1885741c/1395930144/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitJulyGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFES74N_digital_email_20180729_EOMSRec100Days_inact&source=WQEFES74N_digital_email_20180729_EOMSRec100Days_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List
